items.title: Por que a Copa do Mundo é a relação mais tóxica do seu calendário
items.summary: Os festejos de São João conquistam muitos corações no Nordeste. Para alguns, trata-se de uma festa até mais importante que o Carnaval. Ainda mais quando o São João deste ano acontece concomitantemente à Copa do Mundo.

items.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in stock market debut
items.summary: Musk is now worth $1.11tn according to the Bloomberg rich list, while SpaceX listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange with a value of $2.2tn.

items.title: The SpaceX IPO made Musk a trillionaire. The old rules of capitalism no longer apply | Robert Reich
items.summary: The economic principles taught in school aren’t as relevant as hype, connections and total, arbitrary controlShare your views on SpaceX’s stock market debutElon Musk is now the world’s first trillionaire, after his SpaceX exploration and satellite company went public on the Nasdaq on Friday.With shares priced at $135 each, Musk’s aerospace and satellite maker soared to an overall market valuation of approximately $1.77tn – which raised Musk’s net worth (which had already hovered at the astronomical $813bn) into the $1tn stratosphere. Continue reading...

items.title: Can you really travel the world for free? A travel points expert shares her secrets
items.summary: Here’s howStacy Roberts likes to tell her 321,000 followers that her family is rich – in credit card points, that is. Last year alone, she, her husband and their three kids traveled to Spain, Denmark, Austria, Italy, California, Utah and Hawaii all for around $4,300, she says.How does she do it? Roberts says she opens a new credit card each month, allowing her to accumulate around 1m points a year.An adviser on the estate documents that matter more than a willA finance podcaster on how she plans to make her daughter a millionaireA former union organizer on how to negotiate your debts down Continue reading...

items.title: Sublime lança primeiro disco em 30 anos com Pennywise, Bad Brains e mais
items.summary: O ska-punk californiano está em festa! Em um dos retornos e movimentos mais emblemáticos e aguardados da história da música alternativa, o Sublime acaba de disponibilizar em todas as plataformas digitais o seu novo álbum de estúdio Until the Sun Explodes. O trabalho, que marca uma nova e emocionante era para o grupo com Jakob […] O post Sublime lança primeiro disco em 30 anos com Pennywise, Bad Brains e mais apareceu primeiro em TMDQA!.
